_comment: VSCode extension manifest. npm is required here by the VSCode platform — this is a documented exception to the no-npm policy. vscode-languageclient is a VSCode platform dependency, not a general runtime dep.
name: orchestrator-lsp-mcp
description: Cross-domain LSP orchestrator — routes textDocument/* requests across all 12 poly-*-lsp servers via a single connection

boj.orchestratorLsp.adapterDir.description: Path to the orchestrator-lsp-mcp adapter/ Mix project. Defaults to the cartridge directory at BOJ_ORCHESTRATOR_LSP_DIR.

boj.orchestratorLsp.command.description: Command used to start the Elixir GenLSP adapter.

boj.orchestratorLsp.args.description: Arguments passed to the start command.

boj.orchestratorLsp.trace.server.description: Trace LSP communication between the extension and the adapter.
